function.name: _automatic_save_define
function.description: Save automation configuration. Used to create or update a complete automation workflow definition. Must call _read_informat_expression_doc first to read expression documentation before calling this method. Note: If no interactive steps are used, do not use automation; use scripts to implement the project instead. Steps with type starting with Output are interactive steps.

id.description: Automation ID (use camelCase naming, must be unique within the system, must not duplicate existing automation IDs, cannot be empty).
Input parameter type (String, Array<String>, Array<Object>, Integer, Double, Boolean, Object, HttpRequest).

name.description: Variable name. Strongly recommended to use camelCase naming, e.g. recordId. Use ${name} in step expressions to reference the variable value, e.g. ${recordId}.

data.description: Test data, only effective during local testing.

opt.description: Condition connection method. Only one of the following values can be used: and (AND), or (OR). Default is and.

Operator. Only one of the following values can be used (corresponding to Java OPT_* constants):
eq (equals), ne (not equals), gt (greater than), ge (greater than or equal), lt (less than), le (less than or equal),
contains (contains), notcontains (does not contain), startswith (starts with), endswith (ends with),
isnull (is null), isnotnull (is not null), in (in list), notin (not in list),
parentrooteq (root parent equals), parenteq (parent equals), parentcontains (parent contains),
multipleandquery (multi-value AND query), multipleorquery (multi-value OR query), intree (in tree)

value.description: Comparison value expression. If an expression function is used, it must be defined in the Informat Expression SDK documentation and must not be fabricated. Therefore, you must first call the tool `_read_informat_expression_doc` to read the expression documentation before generating any function.

func.description:
Field processing function name. Only one of the following values can be used:
length (length), nlevel (number of levels), nameOfAccount (account name),
day (day), month (month), week (week), quarter (quarter), year (year),
dayofyear (day of year), dayofmonth (day of month), weekofyear (week of year),
daytonow (days to now), weektonow (weeks to now), monthtonow (months to now),
quartertonow (quarters to now), yeartonow (years to now),
fmtday (formatted day), fmtweek (formatted week), fmtmonth (formatted month),
fmtquarter (formatted quarter), fmtyear (formatted year),
hour (hour), minute (minute), second (second)

var.description: Whether it is an expression. Must be set to true, indicating the value is an expression. Default is true.

FieldMappingItem.description: Field assignment mapping.user for InsertRecord / UpdateRecord。

valueType.description: Value type. Must be set to var, indicating the value is an expression.

type.description:
Step type. [Strict constraint] Only the following values are allowed:
[Control Flow] If (conditional branch), If.true (true branch), If.false (false branch), ForEach (loop), While (conditional loop), CallScript (call script function), SetReturnValue (set return value)
[UI-Dialog] OutputConfirm (confirmation dialog), OutputUpload (upload file), OutputUploadExcel (upload Excel), OutputDynamicForm (dynamic form), OutputDynamicTable (dynamic table), OutputRecordInfo (record detail), OutputRecordCreate (create record form), OutputRecordSelect (select record), OutputFormDesigner (form designer), OutputOpenFile (file preview), OutputRichtext (rich text dialog), OutputString (string dialog), OutputPageDesigner (print template), OutputOpenSplitDrawer (drawer/dialog), OutputOpenWebsite (open website page)
[UI-Toast] OutputToast (toast message), OutputNotification (notification)
[UI-Form] OutputSetFormValue (set form field value), OutputFormValidate (form validation), OutputRecordFormRefresh (refresh form), OutputCloseRecordInfo (close record detail), OutputSetFormTableSelection (set form sub-table selection)
[UI-Table] OutputTableRefresh (refresh table), OutputTableEvent (table event), OutputRefreshTableViewColumn (refresh columns), OutputSetTableViewFilter (set filter), OutputSetTableViewFilterCondition (set filter conditions), OutputSetTableViewOrderBy (set sort order), OutputSetTableViewExpand (set expand state), OutputSetTableViewSelection (set selection), OutputSetTableViewActiveRecords (set active records), OutputSetTableViewRootRecordId (set root node), OutputSetTableViewData (set table data)
[UI-Dashboard] OutputRefreshDashboardCard (refresh dashboard card), OutputSetDashboardFilter (set dashboard filter)
[UI-Page] OutputOpenUrl (open URL), OutputExternalUrl (external page), OutputSetExternalUrl (set external URL), OutputCloseModuleVisitHistory (close visit history)
[UI-Print/Download] OutputPrintRecord (print record), OutputPrintRecordList (print record list), OutputPrintByPageDesigner (print by template), OutputDownloadFile (download file), OutputDownloadExcel (download Excel)
[UI-Script/Clipboard] OutputInjectScript (inject script), OutputExecuteScript (execute script), OutputCopyClipboard (copy to clipboard), OutputGetAppClipboard (get app clipboard), OutputSetAppClipboard (set app clipboard)
[UI-Media/Scanner] OutputPlayAudio (play audio), OutputPlayImage (preview image), OutputQRCodeScanner (QR scanner)
[UI-Search/Message] OutputTextindexSearch (full-text search), OutputWebsitePageFireEvent (fire website page event)
[UI-BPMN] OutputBpmnEvent (BPMN event), OutputBpmnProcess (start BPMN process), OutputBpmnTaskInfo (BPMN task info), OutputBpmnInstanceInfo (BPMN instance info)

retValues.description: Output variable list of the current step. Subsequent steps can reference them using ${variableName}.

ifFuncSetting.description: If is a control node and cannot execute logic directly. It must contain exactly two child nodes: If.true and If.false. Actual execution steps must be defined inside their children.

listVar.description: List expression such as ${list}. Must reference a variable from previous steps. Cannot be arbitrarily defined.

outputConfirmFuncSetting.description: Confirmation dialog configuration. Used to pause the automation flow and wait for user confirmation.

confirmTitleHorizontalAlign.description: Text horizontal alignment. Only one of the following values can be used: left (align left), center (align center), right (align right).

confirmTitleVerticalAlign.description: Text vertical alignment. Only one of the following values can be used: top (top), middle (middle), bottom (bottom).

uploadType.description: File storage mode. File = store in shared storage. Base64 = return Base64 encoded content.

maxSize.description: Maximum file size (MB). 0 means no limit.

id.description: Field ID. Must be lowercase letters, 10–13 characters, randomly generated and unique.

key.description: Field identifier. CamelCase format, letters only, randomly generated and unique.

type.description:
Dynamic form field type. Only one of the following values can be used:
SingleText (single-line text), MultiText (multi-line text), RichText (rich text),
Integer (integer), Double (decimal), Date (date), ListSelect (dropdown select),
Attachment (attachment), Checkbox (checkbox), User (user), Department (department),
Coordinate (coordinate), RelationRecord (relation record), Children (tree structure), ID (business ID)

fieldId.description: Target field ID. Must exist in dynamicFormFieldList.

dynamicFormSubmitBeforeAutomaticId.description: Automation ID to execute before form submission.

dynamicFormSubmitBeforeAutomaticVarList.description: Parameter list for the pre-submit automation.

dynamicFormEnableFieldValidate.description: Whether to enable field validation. Currently fixed to false; do not set it to true.

setReturnValueFuncSetting.description: Set the return value of the automation.

whileFuncSetting.description: While loop. Repeats children steps while expression is true.

iftrueFuncSetting.description: If true branch marker node. No additional config.

iffalseFuncSetting.description: If false branch marker node. No additional config.

callScriptFuncSetting.description: Call a script function from a script module.

outputToastFuncSetting.description: Show a toast message on the frontend.

toastValueVar.description: Toast message content expression, must call _read_informat_expression_doc first to read expression documentation

outputNotificationFuncSetting.description: Show a notification popup with title on the frontend.

searchChildrenFullPath.description: Show full path for tree structure

outputSetFormValueFuncSetting.description: Set form field values on the frontend.

outputSetTableViewFilterConditionFuncSet.description: Set table view filter conditions (list mode).

outputSetTableViewExpandFuncSetting.description: Set table view expand/collapse state (tree tables).

outputSetTableViewRootRecordIdFuncSettin.description: Set table view root record ID (tree tables).

outputSetFormTableSelectionFuncSetting.description: Set selection in a form sub-table.

outputDynamicTableFuncSetting.description: Show an interactive dynamic table dialog.

outputOpenUrlFuncSetting.description: Open a URL in new window, current window, or iframe dialog.

outputOpenWebsiteFuncSetting.description: Open a website module page in a dialog.

outputOpenSplitDrawerFuncSetting.description: Open a drawer or dialog showing module/website/URL/template content.

outputExternalFuncSetting.description: Display an external URL page in module area.

outputPrintRecordFuncSetting.description: Print a record as a form.

outputPrintRecordListFuncSetting.description: Print multiple records as a table.

outputPrintByPageDesignerFuncSetting.description: Print using a page designer template.

outputPageDesignerFuncSetting.description: Open a page designer print template in a dialog.

outputDownloadExcelFuncSetting.description: Download data as an Excel file.

outputUploadExcelFuncSetting.description: Upload and parse an Excel file.

outputInjectScriptFuncSetting.description: Inject and execute JavaScript in the current page.

outputPlayImageFuncSetting.description: View an image in a popup.

outputRichtextFuncSetting.description: Show rich text (HTML) content in a dialog.

outputStringFuncSetting.description: Show formatted text in a dialog.

outputWebsitePageFireEventFuncSetting.description: Fire a custom event to an embedded website page.

outputBpmnEventFuncSetting.description: Trigger a BPMN UI event on the frontend.

outputBpmnProcessFuncSetting.description: Open BPMN process start form dialog.

outputBpmnInstanceInfoFuncSetting.description: Open BPMN process instance detail dialog.

AutomaticFunction.description: Automation step node. [type → Required setting and retValues rules (mandatory; missing any is a serious error)] [Control Flow] If → ifFuncSetting + children (exactly 2 children: first If.true, second If.false) If.true → no setting, child of If If.false → no setting, child of If ForEach → forEachFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'object',name:'List item'}, {id:'idx',name:'Index'}) While → whileFuncSetting, children steps SetReturnValue → setReturnValueFuncSetting [Call] CallScript → callScriptFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Return value'}) [Records] QueryRecordList → + retValues ({id:'list',name:'Record list'}), use ${Record list}.size() [UI-Dialog] OutputConfirm → outputConfirmFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Confirmed'}) OutputUpload → outputUploadFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'File list'}) OutputUploadExcel → outputUploadExcelFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Excel data'}) OutputDynamicForm → outputDynamicFormFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Form data'}) OutputDynamicTable → outputDynamicTableFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Table data'}) OutputRecordInfo → outputRecordInfoFuncSetting OutputRecordCreate → outputRecordCreateFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Created record'}) OutputRecordSelect → outputRecordSelectFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Selected records'}) OutputFormDesigner → outputFormDesignerFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Form data'}) OutputOpenFile → outputOpenFileFuncSetting OutputRichtext → outputRichtextFuncSetting OutputString → outputStringFuncSetting OutputPageDesigner → outputPageDesignerFuncSetting OutputOpenSplitDrawer → outputOpenSplitDrawerFuncSetting [UI-Toast] OutputToast → outputToastFuncSetting OutputNotification → outputNotificationFuncSetting [UI-Form] OutputSetFormValue → outputSetFormValueFuncSetting OutputFormValidate → outputFormValidateFuncSetting (no fields) OutputRecordFormRefresh → outputRecordFormRefreshFuncSetting OutputCloseRecordInfo → outputCloseRecordInfoFuncSetting (no fields) OutputStableDiffusionSetForm → outputStableDiffusionSetFormFuncSetting [UI-Table] OutputTableRefresh → outputTableRefreshFuncSetting OutputTableEvent → outputTableEventFuncSetting OutputRefreshTableViewColumn → outputRefreshTableViewColumnFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewFilter → outputSetTableViewFilterFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewFilterCondition → outputSetTableViewFilterConditionFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewOrderBy → outputSetTableViewOrderByFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewExpand → outputSetTableViewExpandFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewSelection → outputSetTableViewSelectionFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewActiveRecords → outputSetTableViewActiveRecordsFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewRootRecordId → outputSetTableViewRootRecordIdFuncSetting OutputSetTableViewData → outputSetTableViewDataFuncSetting OutputSetFormTableSelection → outputSetFormTableSelectionFuncSetting [UI-Dashboard] OutputRefreshDashboardCard → outputRefreshDashboardCardFuncSetting OutputSetDashboardFilter → outputSetDashboardFilterFuncSetting [UI-Navigation] OutputOpenUrl → outputOpenUrlFuncSetting OutputOpenWebsite → outputOpenWebsiteFuncSetting OutputExternal → outputExternalFuncSetting OutputSetExternalUrl → outputSetExternalUrlFuncSetting OutputCloseModuleVisitHistory → outputCloseModuleVisitHistoryFuncSetting [UI-Print/Download] OutputPrintRecord → outputPrintRecordFuncSetting OutputPrintRecordList → outputPrintRecordListFuncSetting OutputPrintByPageDesigner → outputPrintByPageDesignerFuncSetting OutputDownloadFile → outputDownloadFileFuncSetting OutputDownloadExcel → outputDownloadExcelFuncSetting [UI-Script/Clipboard/Media] OutputCopyClipboard → outputCopyClipboardFuncSetting OutputInjectoutputInjectScriptFuncSetting OutputExecuteoutputExecuteScriptFuncSetting OutputPlayAudio → outputPlayAudioFuncSetting OutputPlayImage → outputPlayImageFuncSetting OutputQRCodeScanner → outputQRCodeScannerFuncSetting (no fields) OutputGetAppClipboard → outputGetAppClipboardFuncSetting + retValues ({id:'result',name:'Clipboard data'}) OutputSetAppClipboard → outputSetAppClipboardFuncSetting OutputTextindexSearch → outputTextindexSearchFuncSetting OutputWebsitePageFireEvent → outputWebsitePageFireEventFuncSetting [UI-BPMN] OutputBpmnEvent → outputBpmnEventFuncSetting OutputBpmnProcess → outputBpmnProcessFuncSetting OutputBpmnTaskInfo → outputBpmnTaskInfoFuncSetting OutputBpmnInstanceInfo → outputBpmnInstanceInfoFuncSetting
